nodes.label: AI as step-by-step guidance tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or untrustworthy source
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer right now using AI as a trusted resource and helper for the tasks that I execute on my own but need guidance or specialized information

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI has created a spreadsheet almost instantly whereas it would have taken me a good 1/2 hour or so to create the same thing in Excel

nodes.label: AI image generation capability
nodes.grounding_span: The images rendered have not really been true to the design ideas we have input into the AI and the quality of image has not been the best

nodes.label: AI integration into existing software
nodes.grounding_span: When AI becomes more integrated I would like more automation but I am not ready to entirely hand it all over yet

nodes.label: AI for social media content automation
nodes.grounding_span: I would like to find a reliable AI that would be able to handle all of our accounts, and tailor each one based on the platform

nodes.label: AI as quick research tool for tax legislation
nodes.grounding_span: I would want some trustworthy AI to take that over

nodes.label: Customer privacy concerns with AI
nodes.grounding_span: some do tend to get a bit reluctant if I take a picture of their home with it

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: quicker than what I could have done

nodes.label: Reliability and trustworthiness in tools
nodes.grounding_span: I want some trustworthy AI to take that over

nodes.label: Effective communication and customer satisfaction
nodes.grounding_span: The client and I typically get a good laugh, but I do wish it was more reliable

nodes.label: Personal autonomy and skill preservation
nodes.grounding_span: I have tended to get lazy in some areas where I rely on AI because it's easier and saves time

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: I have felt pretty satisfied when inputting information lots of information and AI has created a spreadsheet almost instantly

nodes.label: Frustration with AI image generation
nodes.grounding_span: The frustrated goes back to the image generation and accuracy in size, color and overall look of what the idea was input not matching what was generated

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: When AI becomes more integrated I would like more automation but I am not ready to entirely hand it all over yet

nodes.label: Desire for comprehensive small business AI
nodes.grounding_span: A specialized AI for small businesses to help in any and all aspects would be amazing

nodes.label: Collaborative problem-solving — uses AI to fill knowledge gaps
nodes.grounding_span: I collaborate. I have what I need to do and achieve in my head but maybe don't have all of the knowledge

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting — clear separation of AI-appropriate vs. human-only tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer sourcing my supplies/products on my own, I don't want suggestions from AI for retail places
